assertions.title: Semester grid renders after plan generation

steps.expected: Account created and redirected to dashboard

steps.observed: Successfully navigated to /plan/new with chat input visible

steps.action: Submit plan request: 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science'
steps.expected: AI generates plan and semester grid appears
steps.observed: Rate limit error displayed: 'Rate limited, try again in a moment'

evidence.network: OpenRouter API returned rate limit (429) - 50 req/day free tier limit reached

assertions.issues: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (50 requests/day) has been reached. The chat interface shows 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' toast notification. Plan generation cannot proceed without AI response.

assertions.title: Semester and overall unit totals displayed

steps.action: Prerequisite: Plan must be generated first
steps.observed: Plan generation blocked by OpenRouter rate limit

assertions.issues: Cannot test unit totals display because plan generation is blocked by OpenRouter rate limit (50 req/day free tier exceeded)

assertions.title: Plan shows prerequisite information

steps.action: Prerequisite: Plan must be generated first
steps.expected: Semester grid with courses and prerequisites appears
steps.observed: Plan generation blocked by OpenRouter rate limit

assertions.issues: Cannot test prerequisite information display because plan generation is blocked by OpenRouter rate limit (50 req/day free tier exceeded)

frictions.description: OpenRouter free tier rate limit (50 requests/day) has been reached, preventing plan generation. The app showed a user-friendly 'Rate limited, try again in a moment' toast notification.
frictions.resolution: Cannot resolve - requires waiting for rate limit reset (daily) or upgrading OpenRouter plan

blockers.description: OpenRouter API rate limit exceeded (50 requests/day free tier). The API returns 429 status causing the chat interface to display 'Rate limited, try again in a moment'.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Submitted plan generation request, received rate limit toast notification. Waited 18 seconds for any cached/stale response, still rate limited.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 0 passed, 0 failed, 3 blocked. All assertions were blocked by OpenRouter API rate limit (50 requests/day free tier exceeded). The app handled the rate limit gracefully with a user-friendly toast notification. Evidence collected: 4 screenshots showing signup flow, plan creation page, and rate limit error state.
